sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34761" key="e)naimw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναιμ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n34761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bloody, like blood</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
